description_long: This house features a single-story structure with a hip roof covered in reddish-orange tiles and bordered by a wide, peach-colored trim. The front facade is defined by two large, rectangular windows with dark brown shutters, set into a beige wall framed by gray stone columns. The base of the house is accented with a blue band above the ground, adding a touch of contrast to the otherwise neutral palette. The side and rear walls are plain, with no visible windows or doors, and the stone columns continue to provide structural emphasis at the corners. The roof's overhang and the clean, geometric lines suggest a modern yet Mediterranean-inspired design. The overall appearance is compact, sturdy, and well-suited for an urban residential neighborhood.
description: A compact, single-story house with a hip tile roof, stone corner columns, and two front windows with shutters, blending modern and Mediterranean styles.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large windows with dark shutters, stone columns, and the tiled hip roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plain beige wall, stone column, and the sloped hip roof with no windows or doors.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a featureless beige wall, stone columns, and the full expanse of the tiled roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a plain wall, stone column, and the hip roof's slope, mirroring the other side.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway not visible; front facade features two large windows with dark shutters and stone columns, suggesting a simple, understated entry.
